Interface IGeometryEnvironment3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control additional global geometry variables.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("923D59BE-A083-44B3-B9A8-A01A580C4F2E")]
public interface IGeometryEnvironment3 : IGeometryEnvironment2, IGeometryEnvironment

DicingEnabled

Indicates whether large polygons are diced before being sent to GDI. True by default.

bool DicingEnabled { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
